title: Crispy Portuguese Skillet
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish featuring crispy-skinned chicken and a creamy sauce. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 2. Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes on each side.
5. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
6. While the chicken is cooking, make the creamy sauce by whisking together the portuguese cream and chicken broth in a small bowl.
7. Remove the skillet from the oven and brush the chicken with the creamy sauce.
8. Return the skillet to the oven and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce is bubbly and slightly caramelized.
9. Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
10. Slice the chicken into thin pieces and serve with the remaining creamy sauce spooned over the top.
